seoTitle: Triangle Flat vs Trundle — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Triangle Flat and Trundle. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Triangle Flat vs Trundle: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Triangle Flat and Trundle.
heading: Triangle Flat vs Trundle — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Triangle Flat, New South Wales and Trundle, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Trundle has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Triangle Flat (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Triangle Flat or Trundle safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Triangle Flat has a flood risk score of 47/100, while Trundle scores 51/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Triangle Flat scores 59/100 for bushfire risk. Trundle scores 42/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Triangle Flat or Trundle?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Trundle has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.12% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
